C1A_CGW_DDT_1_0_0

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 18DAD0F1
Recv ID: 18DAF1D0
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: D0
Func Name: GATEWAY

[
  {
    "diagversion": "5",
    "supplier": "BOSCH",
    "soft": "0001",
    "version": "0001"
  }
